name: Varnish Purger
description: Purger for varnish. Purges page caches from varnish. Works together with the purge module.
consumes_plugin_types: Purge Purger (@PurgePurger) — provides 'varnish' (HTTP purger, one request per invalidation), 'varnishbundled' (one request per batch) and 'varnish_zeroconfig_purger' (settings.php-driven load-balancer purger) purger plugins
Purge DiagnosticCheck (@PurgeDiagnosticCheck) — 'varnishconfiguration' self-test that only lets fully configured Varnish purgers load
id_note: The Drupal.org project is 'varnish_purge' (used as this docs directory name to match the project URL), but the MAIN module's machine name — and thus data_name — is 'varnish_purger'. The submodules live under the project 'varnish_purge'.
